title: Convert a large-list assign to a stream with full update wiring
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/assigns_messages_inbox.ex loads ~12000 messages into assigns. Rewrite it as lib/my_app_web/live/inbox_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.InboxLive) using stream/3. The LiveView must: (1) stream(:messages, [], reset: false) in mount, (2) reset/populate the stream in handle_params via stream(..., reset: true), (3) render a container with id="messages" and phx-update="stream", iterating with {dom_id, msg}, (4) handle stream_delete for "delete" events, (5) handle stream_insert at: 0 on {:new_message, m}, (6) track a separate :message_count assign because you cannot Enum.count @streams.
tier_rationale: Multi-step conversion with container wiring + separate count tracking. Sonnet usually catches the swap but forgets the count-via-assign or the reset: true.
research_citation: oliver-kriska iron law + fly.io Phoenix Dev Blog - Streams
